card.title: Thyroid Support
card.description: Designed to supply key nutrients that play a role in thyroid hormone synthesis, conversion, and overall metabolic function. With iodine, selenium, zinc, and B12, alongside adaptogenic and amino acid support from ashwagandha, L-tyrosine, and inositol, this blend offers nutritional building blocks for a well-rounded approach to thyroid health.
card.finePrint: Cancel your subscription anytime. *These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagn...

benefits.title: Key Nutrient Support
benefits.description: Includes iodine, selenium, and zinc—nutrients involved in thyroid hormone pathways.

benefits.title: Strategic Pairing of Ingredients
benefits.description: Inositol combined with selenium provides nutritional support for healthy thyroid- stimulating hormone (TSH) activity.

benefits.title: Provides Key Building Blocks
benefits.description: L-tyrosine offers foundational amino acid support involved in the body’s natural production of thyroid hormones.

splitContent.title: Stay balanced, feel aligned
splitContent.subTitle: Thyroid Support helps you stay steady with nutrients that nourish your energy, mood, and metabolism.
features: Provides building blocks for thyroid hormone production
Supports thyroid signaling and nutrient conversion
Complements daily intake of minerals and amino acids essential for thyroid health

quotes.quote: “The supplements they offer were able to target the deficits that my lab tests indicated, and I feel fantastic. I am sleeping better, getting stronger, and my recovery has improved. Conquer have made a definite difference and helped me reach my fitness goals!”
quotes.author: Michael N. G.

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What is the best way and time to take Thyroid Support* supplement?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: Can I take Thyroid Support* with other supplements or medications?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: Can I see the testing for purity, heavy metals, or the Certificate of Analysis (COA) for this product?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: What can I expect from Joi + Blokes?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.
